name: manifest-it
description: Ergonomic-fix grab bag for the Claude Code substrate. Bundles: (1) vision bridge — text-only models auto-describe images instead of dead-ending on 'model does not support vision'; (2) image-gen bridge — routes image generation to gpt-image-2; (3) ForceLink — Stop hook that blocks turns ending with bare file paths, forcing clickable URLs; (4) a sanitized, distilled operating-ethos CLAUDE.md (a16z/Garry Tan hybrid). A shipping manifest of small substrate fixes.
